title: TMT Quantum Vault — Codebase Explanation
summary: TMT Quantum Vault is a 17-node Toroidal Merkaba Topology (TMT) multi-agent quantum intelligence system. Each agent's DNA is derived from real IBM quantum hardware runs, grounding the system in verifiable physics. The CLI-driven Python package orchestrates local and cloud LLM inference, validates all JSON artifacts, and exposes a structured evaluation and release-gate workflow.

project_purpose.core_concept: A 17-node resonant intelligence lattice (Toroidal Merkaba Topology) whose agent genomes are seeded from IBM quantum chip measurements
key_capabilities: Hardware-validated agent DNA from IBM Fez (127q), Torino, and Casablanca quantum processors
Three-layer entropy: Quantum QTRG + DNA discovery + BitNet ternary weights
Sacred geometry mathematics (golden ratio φ, Fibonacci, φ²-scaling)
Multi-backend LLM inference via Ollama (local and cloud) and llama.cpp
Structured 3-stage agent pipeline: Workflow → Validator → Visual
Release-gate CI/CD workflow with evidence bundles
39-test regression suite validating all CLI commands and output modes

directory_structure.tmt_quantum_vault/: Core Python package — CLI, models, repository loader, runtime, Ollama API client, output renderer
directory_structure.Agent_*/: 17 agent directories, each containing conscious_dna.json with quantum-derived DNA metrics
directory_structure.Cognitive_Nexus/: Inter-agent strategic memory store — persisted knowledge and activation records
directory_structure.tools/: Standalone maintenance scripts: DNA ingestion, GGUF extraction, circuit runners, README generation
directory_structure.dna_circuits_library/: Ingested IBM circuit templates for DNA seeding
directory_structure.evals/: Evaluation datasets (JSON) consumed by the eval CLI command
directory_structure.checkpoints/: Saved state snapshots for agent continuity
directory_structure.Models/: GGUF model files for llama.cpp inference
directory_structure.Resonance_Logs/: Daily, weekly, and monthly observational logs
directory_structure.docs/: Additional documentation (cloud-only release playbook, secret scanning policy)

files.__main__.py: Module entry point — imports and calls cli.app()
files.cli.py: Typer CLI application with 14 commands (~3 000 lines)
files.models.py: Pydantic v2 schemas for all JSON artifacts (AgentDNA, VaultConfig, RuntimeConfig)
files.repository.py: VaultRepository class — loads and validates agents, vault config, and eval datasets
files.runner.py: RuntimeRunner — orchestrates prompt execution against Ollama or llama.cpp
files.runtime.py: Runtime environment inspection: detects Ollama daemon, llama.cpp executable, cloud access
files.ollama_api.py: Low-level Ollama HTTP API client (generate, list, health endpoints)
files.output.py: JSON and Rich terminal rendering helpers

repository_inspection.summary: Vault overview — agent count, fitness statistics, top agent
repository_inspection.validate: JSON schema validation across all artifacts
repository_inspection.doctor: System health check — runtime dependencies and repository integrity
repository_inspection.runtime: Runtime environment status — Ollama, llama.cpp, cloud access

execution.run: Execute a prompt against the configured Ollama backend
execution.smoke-local: Local smoke test with minimal model
execution.agent-task: Execute a task through the 3-stage pipeline: Workflow → Validator → Visual

evaluation_and_release.eval: Run evaluation cases from a JSON dataset with expectation matching
evaluation_and_release.compare-evidence: Compare baseline vs. current evidence bundles
evaluation_and_release.release-evidence: Generate evidence bundles for CI/CD gates

output_flags.--json: Emit structured JSON payload (returncode, timestamp, records)
output_flags.--record-path: Write JSON output to a file

AgentDNA.description: One agent's quantum-derived genome and resonance metrics

key_fields.conscious_dna: DNA nucleotide sequence derived from quantum circuit measurements

VaultConfig.description: Runtime and structural configuration for the entire vault

key_fields.runtime: RuntimeConfig block: backend, local model, cloud model, API key env var, llama.cpp path
key_fields.stability_baseline: Fitness baseline used for regression detection

Typer.role: Type-safe CLI framework powering all 14 commands

Pydantic.role: Runtime JSON schema validation for all artifact types

Requests.role: HTTP client for Ollama API (generate, health, list)

Rich.role: Terminal tables, panels, progress bars, and coloured output

Pytest.role: Regression test runner (39 tests in tests/test_regression.py)

Qiskit.role: IBM quantum circuit construction (tools/ only, not required at runtime)

Ollama.role: Local and cloud LLM inference backend (Qwen models)

llama.cpp.role: Optional local GGUF model inference via subprocess

GGUF.role: Quantized model weight format; BitNet ternary weights extracted by tools/bitnet_gguf_extractor.py

GitHub Actions.role: CI/CD — pytest, diagnostics, smoke tests, release-gate workflow

ollama_cloud.description: Ollama Cloud API (https://ollama.com) — requires OLLAMA_API_KEY env var

llama_cpp.description: Local GGUF inference via llama.cpp subprocess

sacred_geometry.note: φ² scaling governs fitness enhancement; sacred_score = 1/φ ≈ 0.618 signals confirmed φ-convergence in Sierpinski fractal circuits

categories: Output handling (ANSI stripping, <think> tag removal, unicode safety)
JSON output mode validation for all CLI commands
Release evidence generation and gate checking
CLI runner integration via typer.testing.CliRunner with mocked dependencies

ci_cd_pipeline.trigger: Push to master, pull requests, manual dispatch

jobs.pytest: Python 3.13 — install deps, run regression suite
jobs.diagnostics: python -m compileall, tmt_quantum_vault validate, tmt_quantum_vault summary
jobs.smoke-matrix: Optional — cloud smoke tests using OLLAMA_API_KEY secret (manual trigger)
jobs.release-gate-cloud: Optional — generate evidence bundles, compare, enforce release gate

configuration_files.metatron_geometry.json: Sacred geometry parameters (φ, δS, node counts, harmonics)
configuration_files.optimization_log.json: Historical optimisation entries with fitness and resonance metrics
configuration_files.baseline_v0.1.0-alpha.json: Baseline fitness metrics for regression detection
configuration_files.bitnet_info.json: BitNet ternary weight statistics for the entropy layer

steps: 2. Typer routes to agent_task() handler in cli.py
3. VaultRepository(root) loads all Agent_*/conscious_dna.json via Pydantic AgentDNA schema
4. RuntimeRunner selects backend (Ollama local/cloud or llama.cpp) from vault_config.json
5. Workflow agent prompt is sent to ollama_api.py → Ollama HTTP API
6. Response passes through Validator agent, then Visual agent for formatting
7. output.py renders structured JSON with returncode, timestamp, and stage records
